title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic has released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos class model that achieves top benchmark performance including on SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model supports extended context, vision capabilities, and demonstrates strong performance on coding and vision tasks.
writeup: This video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, described as its first Mythos class model. The model posts top results on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, which matters as a measure of coding capability against competing systems. Concrete takeaways: Fable 5 supports extended context for long-running tasks, adds vision capabilities, and shows strong performance on code generation and fullstack app development.
